mode.description: "local" for self-hosted Cognee, "cloud" for Cognee Cloud (default: local). Also settable via COGNEE_MODE env var. Cloud mode supports: add, search, cognify, delete. Update (modifying existing data) is not yet supported — use the Cognee Cloud platform or API directly.

baseUrl.description: Cognee API base URL (default: http://localhost:8011). Also settable via COGNEE_BASE_URL env var.

datasetName.description: Cognee dataset name for single-scope mode (default: agent_sessions). Also settable via COGNEE_PLUGIN_DATASET env var. Ignored when multi-scope is enabled.

companyDataset.description: Dataset name for company-wide shared memory. Setting this enables multi-scope mode.

userDatasetPrefix.description: Prefix for user-scoped datasets (becomes '{prefix}-{userId}'). Setting this enables multi-scope mode.

agentDatasetPrefix.description: Prefix for agent-scoped datasets (becomes '{prefix}-{agentId}'). Setting this enables multi-scope mode.

agentDatasetTemplate.description: Template for the per-agent dataset name with '{agentId}' placeholder (e.g. '{agentId}' for bare id, 'memory-{agentId}' for prefixed). Takes precedence over agentDatasetPrefix when set. Enables multi-scope mode.

userId.description: User identifier for user-scoped memory (or set OPENCLAW_USER_ID env var)

agentId.description: Agent identifier for agent-scoped memory (or set OPENCLAW_AGENT_ID env var, default: 'default')

recallScopes.description: Memory scopes to search during recall, in priority order (default: ['agent', 'user', 'company'])

defaultWriteScope.description: Default scope for files that don't match any scopeRouting pattern (default: 'agent')

pattern.description: Glob pattern to match file paths (e.g. 'memory/company/**')

scopeRouting.description: Rules to route memory files to scopes based on path patterns. First match wins.

enableSessions.description: Enable session-based conversation tracking for multi-turn recall (default: true)

persistSessionsAfterEnd.description: Persist session Q&A pairs into the knowledge graph after agent ends (default: true)

captureSession.description: Capture each tool call as a trace entry and each prompt/answer pair as a QA entry in Cognee's session cache (default: true; requires enableSessions)

searchType.description: Cognee search mode (default: HYBRID_COMPLETION — combined vector + graph retrieval)

deleteMode.description: Cognee delete mode: 'soft' removes raw data only, 'hard' also removes degree-one graph nodes (default: soft)

maxResults.description: Max recall results to inject per scope (default: 6)

minScore.description: Minimum score to include in recall (default: 0)

maxTokens.description: Token cap for recall per scope (default: 512)

recallInjectionPosition.description: Where recalled memories are injected: prepend to system prompt, append to system prompt, or prepend to prompt context (default: prependSystemContext)

autoRecall.description: Inject memories before each agent run (default: true)

autoIndex.description: Auto-sync memory files to Cognee on plugin startup (default: true)

autoCognify.description: Run cognify after new memories are added (default: true)

autoMemify.description: Run memify (graph enrichment) after cognify completes (default: false)

recallTimeoutMs.description: Per recall HTTP call timeout on the prompt path, no retries (default: 2500)

recallBudgetMs.description: Overall wall-clock budget for the recall step per prompt; when exceeded the turn proceeds without memories (default: 4000)

recallBreakerThreshold.description: Consecutive recall failures (network/timeout/5xx) before recall is temporarily skipped (default: 5)

recallBreakerCooldownMs.description: How long recall is skipped after the breaker opens (default: 120000)

requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout in milliseconds for Cognee requests (default: 60000)

ingestionTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout in milliseconds for add/update (ingestion) requests (default: 300000 = 5 min)

searchPrompt.description: System prompt sent to Cognee to guide search query processing (default: '')
